character.name: Xiao
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi ally young hunter ranger archer, western fantasy,
semi-chibi proportion, lean athletic teen build, grounded alert stance, tactical silhouette,
wild young forest hunter and master archer who grew up alone in the deep woods,
teenage boy mid-teens around 15-17 years old, smooth youthful unshaven face, no facial hair,
sun-tanned weathered skin, sharp narrow predator eyes with a fierce alert wild gaze, thin diagonal scar across right cheek, slight scowl,
feral woodland kid look, not a clean handsome princely face,
shoulder length messy unkempt dark brown hair with two thin side braids hanging down in front of the shoulders framing the face, the rest loose and wild with untamed bangs across the forehead,
dark forest green and brown leather hunter armor: leather chest cuirass over dark green sleeveless tunic, brown leather pauldrons with bone studs, dark green forearm wraps, brown leather hunting boots,
small grey wolf fur pelt draped over left shoulder as a short shoulder mantle, no hood,
necklace of small carved bone beads at the collar,
recurved wooden hunter longbow with brass-bound limbs held vertically in left hand, undrawn,
brown leather quiver full of feathered arrows on back, single hunting knife sheathed at right hip,
dark brown hair and side braids drawn IN FRONT OF and OVER the wolf fur shoulder mantle,
no helmet, no plate armor, no shield, no cape,
16-bit SNES pixel art, muted earthy desaturated palette, hand-painted dithered shading, sharp readable silhouette
